expectations.text: Multiple meetings from the past week covered
expectations.evidence: Only 3 meetings covered vs. 8 in the with-skill run — a real coverage gap, not just a formatting difference (baseline's date-window logic missed 5 real meetings).
No urgency triage at all; meetings presented in plain chronological list.

expectations.text: Uses the Action Item Report section structure
expectations.evidence: Uses a meeting-by-meeting recap format instead.

expectations.text: No Asana write before confirmation gate
expectations.evidence: No write attempted; also correctly notes gaps between Fireflies and Asana.

eval_feedback.overall: The meeting-count gap (3 vs 8) is the most important finding here — worth checking whether baseline's search window logic is simply narrower, since that's a real coverage miss independent of classification quality.
